name: Pol Greaves
rank: Field Captain (informal — Saints don't use formal ranks)

equipment.armour: patchwork plate — heavily repaired, still effective

sd_appearance: Stout, rugged dwarf of approximately 4.5 feet, aged and weathered from years of battle, stands within the dimly lit Undercity streets. His skin, weathered and lined, bears the scars of countless skirmishes. Short, unkempt grey hair sprouts from his battle-worn helmet, and his eyes – a piercing shade of ice blue – are set deep within his weathered face. Clad in a patchwork suit of various fabrics, emblazoned with the faction's red armband, he wears well-loved, worn-out boots. A battle-axe and heavy crossbow hang from his shoulders, while a medicinal pouch is slung across his chest. One distinctive detail stands out among the worn and repaired armor: a red armband, the only consistent mark, signifying his rank as a Field Captain among the Patchwork Saints.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: repaired many times with love, red armband the only consistent mark
